data.title: Black Dragon Capital strengthens influence in FOMEX 2026, ties to Saudi Media Forum. CEO Louis Hernandez, Jr. to speak at 5th Saudi Media Forum.
data.description: Expanding its current partnerships in the region, the company strengthens connections with the Saudi Media Forum to support the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia in reaching its 2030 vision. Louis Hernandez, Jr., the firm's Founder and CEO, is set to address the 5th Saudi Media Forum, showcasing the firm's commitment to the region and its objectives.

data.title: Skanska named among world's 'Most Admired Companies' by Fortune, top global recognition for corporate reputation.
data.description: Skanska, based in Stockholm, has recently been recognized as one of the world's 'Most Admired Companies' by Fortune magazine, a highly esteemed honor in the corporate world. This acknowledgement stems from a detailed global survey administered by Fortune, highlighting the company's strong reputation and performance. The news, announced on January 21, 2026, underscores Skanska's influence and standing in the industry.

data.title: Doseology starts pilot production of caffeine-based energy pouches for Feed That Brain® in oral stimulant format.
data.description: Kelowna, British Columbia - On January 21, 2026, Doseology Sciences Inc. (CSE: MOOD | PINK: DOSEF | FSE: VU70), a prominent company in biotechnology-driven consumer goods, unveiled the commencement of a trial production of non-nicotine, caffeine-powered energy products.

data.title: Families urged to plan for senior living in 2026. Discussions on future care, finances for elderly loved ones underway.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona, a new year typically prompts individuals to engage in reflection, set goals, and make plans for the future. These discussions often revolve around considerations for future living situations, care requirements, and financial readiness for elderly family members. It encourages families to have these conversations early on to ensure preparedness.

data.title: Qiagen N.V. considers possible sale as new buyer interest emerges; engaged advisors to evaluate offers from potential suitors.
data.description: Qiagen N.V., a German life sciences tools company listed on NYSE as QGEN, is currently exploring strategic options, potentially a sale, due to renewed interest in acquisition. The company is in talks with advisors and evaluating early-stage offers from potential buyers, with a focus on U.S.-based strategic buyers. Despite previous unsuccessful deal attempts, Qiagen has engaged in preliminary discussions with multiple parties. The supervisory board is overseeing the process. CEO Thierry Bernard is set to step down once a successor is named, as revealed in November 2025. The situation is evolving, and there is no guarantee that these talks will lead to a transaction.

data.title: 30% of workplace retirement accounts could be inactive, dubbed as "Zombie 401(k)s" by PensionBee's analysis on Form 5500 data.
data.description: According to PensionBee's examination of Form 5500 information, it is estimated that more than 30% of 401(k) and 403(b) accounts could be inactive.

data.title: Empire Petroleum sets record date (Feb 2, 2026) for Rights Offering to raise $6.0 million through NYSE American.
data.description: Empire Petroleum Corporation (NYSE American: EP) based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, disclosed plans for a subscription rights offering to raise funds. The company, operating in New Mexico, North Dakota, Montana, Texas, and Louisiana, established February 2, 2026, as the record date for this offering. Through the Rights Offering, Empire aims to generate around $6.0 million in gross proceeds.

data.title: Bloom Energy (NYSE: BE) to reveal Q4 2025 financials on Feb 5, 2026 after market close. Conference call at 2 pm PT / 5 pm ET. Dial 1.888.596.4144.
data.description: Bloom Energy Corporation (NYSE: BE) has scheduled the release of its Q4 2025 financial results for February 5, 2026, after the market closes. The company's management will conduct a conference call on the same day at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss these results. The event is expected to last for 60 minutes. For those interested, the live dial-in number is 1.888.596.4144 (toll-free) | 1.646.

data.title: Hennion & Walsh in Parsippany, N.J. hires industry veteran, James Pruskowski, as Managing Director.
data.description: In Parsippany, New Jersey, on January 21, 2026, Hennion & Walsh made an exciting announcement through PRNewswire about the addition of a highly experienced professional to their team. James Pruskowski, a seasoned industry veteran, has come on board as the new Managing Director. This appointment comes as a response to the company's expansion and the increasing needs of their clients for specialized knowledge. James Pruskowski's vast experience in the industry will undoubtedly enhance the services provided by Hennion & Walsh.

data.title: New OtterBox Unbreakable Love Collection combines romance and resilience with playful designs for Valentine's Day 2026.
data.description: In Fort Collins, Colorado, a new OtterBox Symmetry Series Unbreakable Love Collection is set to launch this Valentine's Day on January 21, 2026. The collection includes designs with playful polka dots, elegant florals, and flirty elements like lipstick, bows, and lock-and-key motifs. This collection aims to combine romance with resilience and is expected to resonate with consumers looking for both style and durability in their phone accessories.
